design_philosophy: Enterprise-grade, minimal, futuristic, clean, and highly trustworthy. Focus on a modern SaaS aesthetic with strong visual hierarchy, smooth animations, glassmorphism, clean whitespace, and organic shapes for imagery.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-tight

components.button: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-black text-white px-8 py-4 text-sm font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg
components.card: bg-neutral-50 border border-black/5 rounded-3xl p-8 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300
components.glass_header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5

images.description: Confident entrepreneur crossing arms, use in organic shape
Group of people strategizing with laptops

sections.title: Funding ideas in diverse regions
sections.content: John Vekser is a global platform that sponsors entrepreneurs from disadvantaged backgrounds with big ideas who want to create a high impact in their communities and transform economies through business.
sections.layout: Two-column split. Left text, Right large organic shaped image. Generous padding.

sections.title: Turning disadvantaged communities into thriving economies.
sections.layout: Centered alignment, large heading, abstract shapes framing the text.

sections.title: Redefining businesses, enriching communities.
sections.content: We support entrepreneurs in various ways, including raising capital, creating co-founding teams, entering seed accelerators, gaining traction, building teams, creating products, switching from employee to entrepreneur, and more.
sections.layout: Grid bento box displaying these capabilities.
Three-column staggered grid for Leadership, Strategize, and Growth.

blocks.title: Leadership
blocks.content: We're committed to cultivating robust leadership for the evolving business landscape. Through expert-led training, we develop leaders who can confidently inspire and guide.

blocks.title: Strategize
blocks.content: We offer platforms for founders to learn from experienced leaders. Our resources, like educational programs and advanced facilities, enable entrepreneurs to make significant decisions.

blocks.title: Growth
blocks.content: Our commitment extends beyond fostering leadership and aiding decision-making. We provide the funding and tech tools to boost growth, turning potential into measurable business success.

sections.title: Fostering entrepreneurship globally.
sections.content: With a base in Florida, and offices in Los Angeles, Peru, India, Israel, and Portugal.
sections.layout: Full width dark map aesthetic or minimalist text overlaying a blurred globe visual.

sections.title: Building entrepreneurial ecosystems.
sections.content: Vekser offers financial and educational support to underprivileged young entrepreneurs globally.
sections.layout: Massive typography with a call-to-action to end the page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all images are wrapped in containers with organic border-radius classes, e.g., rounded-[4rem_1rem_4rem_1rem] or rounded-full. Avoid basic squares.
Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations (fade up, slow scale) on scroll.
Implement the 'Featured In' section using a smooth marquee animation.
Keep backgrounds purely white or a very subtle off-white for bento cards.

Never use generic default fonts. Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings if possible (import via font-face or Google Fonts equivalent if needed like 'Space Grotesk' or just local styling), and Satoshi/Inter for body.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and links.
Use Lucide icons to augment the text naturally, sparingly.
